=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace 'ErrorA' with '@effect/test-app/test/ErrorA'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics deterministicKeys:error
import * as Context from "effect/Context"
import * as Data from "effect/Data"

export class ExpectedServiceIdentifier
  extends Context.Tag("ExpectedServiceIdentifier")<ExpectedServiceIdentifier, {}>()
{}

export class ErrorA extends Data.TaggedError("@effect/test-app/test/ErrorA")<{}> {}
